title: Majesty 62
description:
The Majesty 62 is a 2018 Gulf Craft flybridge motor yacht stretching 18.8 metres, built to the highest GRP standards and powered by twin MAN i6-800 engines delivering a top speed of 25 knots.

Accommodating up to 8 guests across 4 en-suite cabins, she features a Gyro stabiliser, hydraulic bathing platform, and bow and stern thrusters for effortless manoeuvring. With 450 engine hours and a Kohler 28kW generator, this vessel is in excellent condition and ready for immediate use.

A refined combination of comfort and performance, ideal for private cruising or charter deployment in the Middle East and Mediterranean. Contact Yacht Research for full specifications and a private viewing.
